notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.heading: It's gone!
notFound.description: We searched every corner for this page, but found nothing.

greeting: Meet <1>Shioru</1>, Your Trusted Companion on Discord
greetingDescription: Enhance your Discord server with Shioru's features, including moderation, fun commands, and more.
outstandingFeaturesDescription: Born to enhance your Discord server experience with powerful tools and fun interactions.
smartCommandsDescription: Use powerful, easy-to-understand commands to make your work more efficient.
serverManagementDescription: Manage your server easily with advanced tools and features.
funInteractionsDescription: Make your server more fun with exciting and unique interactions.
musicPlayerDescription: Enjoy your favorite songs on your server with a quality music player.
powerfulCommandsDescription: Explore Shioru's wide range of commands, born to take care of your server.
cannotLoadCommands: The command is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
moreCommands: And many more commands to use! Explore them all at <1>/help</1>

messages.isComing: I'm here, I'm here, what's going on?

yourFriendInLonelyTimesDescription: Whether it's notifying people in and out, playing music, creating board games, or just being a lonely companion on days when he doesn't need them, she's always there to talk to. Whenever you miss her, just type <1>@Shioru</1> and start chatting!
shioruIsUnderCare: Because every action is under supervision, even Shioru must always be supervised.
healthMonitoringMayError: The health monitoring system may have failed and we are working hard to resolve the issue as soon as possible.
contactUsToReportProblem: If you encounter any issues, you can report them to the developer or send an email to {{email}}.
readyToInvite: Ready to make changes to your server?
inviteToJoinWithManyServer: Join thousands of servers with Shioru already on them.
aboutShioruWebsite: Shioru is a versatile Discord bot that enhances your server with management tools, fun commands, and more.
servicesGoal: Shioru's service objectives and terms and conditions.
weCareAboutYourPrivacy: We take your privacy seriously. This document explains what information we collect, how we use it, store it, and your rights to control your information.
learnMoreAboutCookiesPolicy: Learn more about the cookies we collect from Shioru and third-party cookies.
weUseThirdPartyCookie: We use third-party cookies to personalize content, ads, and analyze site traffic. <1>Learn more</1>
aboutThisWebsite: Your best personal assistants will help your guild look more lively. She can do so many things that you can easily see detailed information on all commands by typing /help.

homeDashboard.title: Manage Everything From <1>Browser</1>
homeDashboard.subtitle: No commands needed. Configure your bot visually with a powerful web dashboard - adjust language, notifications, DJ mode, chat system, security, leaderboard and more without typing a single command.
homeDashboard.languageDesc: Set the bot's language per server.
homeDashboard.djsDesc: Control who can manage music playback.
homeDashboard.notificationDesc: Configure 30+ event notifications with custom embeds.
homeDashboard.chatDesc: Create custom conversations and scripts per server.
homeDashboard.leaderboardDesc: Track member activity with per-server leveling.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loginRequired: Sign in with Discord to manage your servers.
dashboard.logoutConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to logout?
dashboard.selectServerDesc: Choose a server you want to manage.
dashboard.noGuilds: No servers found. Make sure the bot is in your server.
dashboard.overviewDesc: Manage your server settings from here.
dashboard.languageDesc: Set the bot's language for this server.
dashboard.languageTypeDesc: Choose how the bot determines which language to use.
dashboard.localeDesc: Select the language when using CUSTOM type.
dashboard.djsDesc: Control who can manage music playback.
dashboard.djsEnableDesc: Restrict music controls to specific roles or users.
dashboard.djsOnlyDesc: Only DJs can control music. Others cannot use music commands.
dashboard.djRolesDesc: Add role IDs that can control music.
dashboard.djUsersDesc: Add user IDs that can control music.
dashboard.antibotDesc: Protect your server from unwanted bots.
dashboard.antibotEnableDesc: Automatically kick unauthorized bots from the server.
dashboard.antibotAllDesc: Kick all bots except Shioru. If disabled, only bots in the list below will be kicked.
dashboard.antibotListDesc: Add bot IDs that should be kicked when they join.
dashboard.leaderboardDesc: View the top members by experience.
dashboard.captchaEnableDesc: Require new members to verify with a captcha before accessing the server.
dashboard.captchaTextDesc: The text that the captcha will display for members to type.
dashboard.captchaTextPlaceholder: e.g. I agree to the rules
dashboard.captchaRoleDesc: The role to assign when a member passes verification.
dashboard.chatDesc: Custom conversations for this server. The bot checks these before using AI.
dashboard.noConversations: No custom conversations for this server yet.
dashboard.languagePageDesc: Choose how the bot determines which language to use for this server.
dashboard.djsPageDesc: Restrict music controls to specific roles or users.
dashboard.notificationPageDesc: Send automatic messages when events happen in your server.
dashboard.antibotPageDesc: Automatically kick unauthorized bots when they join your server.
dashboard.captchaPageDesc: Require new members to solve a captcha before accessing the server.
dashboard.leaderboardPageDesc: View the top members ranked by level and experience.
dashboard.chatPageDesc: Add custom conversations for this server. The bot checks these patterns before using AI.
dashboard.embedEmpty: Fill in the fields to see a preview
